name: Vedika Bandhi, Cory 2020
subject: Cory took my phone and called my mom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, I'm Vedika! You haven't heard from me yet, but I work on the Cory 2020 analytics team. A few months ago, I won our staff fundraising challenge and as the winner, I had the chance to grab lunch with Cory here in Newark. **[If you enter our contest right now, you can have the chance to enjoy a meal with him, too! Chip in here to be automatically entered.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191012_VB_20191012-fr-VB-dinnercontest6-actives_actives_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** At first, Cory asked me about my background and where I went to school. **But this was my shot to spend an hour with Cory Booker, and I wasn 't going to pass up the opportunity to ask him the hard-hitting questions the people deserve to know.** I wanted to talk about our favorite movies and TV shows -- and he couldn't have been more excited to indulge me in that. During our lunch, we covered everything -- from who his favorite _Supernatural_ character is, to how much he enjoyed _Avengers: Endgame_ , to how we both cried when we watched the movie _Love, Simon_ \-- It. Was. Amazing. We even shared the same take that _Avatar: The Last Airbender_ is one of the greatest shows of all time. But my favorite moment? Cory took my phone and called my mom. **[You're missing out if you don't at least try to have the same amazing experience that I did. It's easy to automatically enter the contest. You can do so right here!](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191012_VB_20191012-fr-VB-dinnercontest6-actives_actives_l2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It was so awesome and an experience I'll never forget. Of course, Cory is this genius and can talk about politics like no other. But what makes a meal with him really special is that he's just a genuinely fun, down-to-earth guy. It's not every day that you can geek out with our next president. Good luck!
Vedika Vedika Bandhi
Cory 2020 _PS -- I wasn 't kidding about Cory calling my mom!_ __ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191012_VB_20191012-fr-VB-dinnercontest6-actives_actives_button_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 3, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a40/5fca0d19/772df8cc/291f8b03/651773916/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab") or click [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a40/5fca0d19/772df8cc/291f8b02/651773916/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/Dinner-with-Cory") to enter without contributing. Four (4) winners will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to a destination in Sponsor's sole discretion; one-night hotel accommodations for winner; opportunity to have dinner with Senator Cory Booker (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules at [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a40/5fca0d19/772df8cc/291f8b01/651773916/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/dinner-with-cory-contest/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._

name: Team Warner
subject: it's not too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's not too late to give your input on which issues the Senate should prioritize.
|
---
| | | __**2019 Supporter Record**__
**Survey prepared for:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Responses needed:** 2,000
**Deadline:** 9:00 AM, October 15th, 2019

**[Take Mark's Priority Survey>>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d07d/53d9897e/5264e39d/1c8ef3fb/459666072/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/stratresend4")**
---
Derek,

Recently, I asked you to take my fall survey and let me know which issues the Senate should prioritize. [**If you haven 't had a chance to take it yet, it's not too late to give your input.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d07d/53d9897e/5264e39d/1c8ef3fb/459666072/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/stratresend4")

My team showed me the results so far, and your top issues were pretty clear. You want:
* To **secure our elections** from future foreign interference
* Progress on bipartisan, common-sense **gun safety laws**

I'm right there with you, Derek. Our nation is hurting in the wake of one mass shooting after another, and candidly, enough is enough. There are a number of common-sense gun safety reforms that Americans from across the political spectrum actually agree on. It's only the special interests and politicians like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell who are standing in the way of bipartisan action to make our communities safer.

I'm also incredibly alarmed that our elections remain vulnerable to foreign interference. This is an issue I've been fighting hard on, despite Republican obstruction in the Senate. Still, we're making headway and gradually winning the bipartisan support we need to get this done before the 2020 elections.

These are two areas where we need action immediately, and I'm planning to keep up the fight in the Senate. But right now, I want to know what issue matters to you the most. **[Derek, if you haven't taken my fall survey yet, will you weigh in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d07d/53d9897e/5264e39d/1c8ef3fb/459666072/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/stratresend4")**

Thanks,
Mark

subject: Trump abandons another ally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump announced this week that he was withdrawing U.S. forces from northeast Syria where they have been working with our Kurdish allies to fight ISIS, despite the threats of a looming Turkish offensive against them. Now, that Turkish offensive is in full swing and throwing the region into chaos, undoing the progress we've made. This abandonment of a critical ally in the fight against terrorism sends a chilling message to the rest of the world that the U.S. will only align with you when it serves our interests and abandon you when we grow tired. This is just another instance of how Trump's unpredictable and reckless approach to foreign politics and military matters harms this nation and its ability to conduct business in the future. We're asking voters what they think: **Do you approve of Trump's abandoning of our allies?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddee/6e9863e8/15625b6c/1db0ff4d/1816817820/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BagldECH") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddee/6e9863e8/15625b6c/1db0ff4d/1816817820/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BagldECH") Thank you so much for your input \-- with the rapid changes in the political landscape, hearing from engaged voters on the issues will help us set our strategy for 2020. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddee/6e9863e8/15625b6c/1db0ff53/1816817820/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191013a.ND&refcode2=VfJfrK1EqF7cDdRZ9vRT")

| | **The Supreme Court is back in session. And their 2019-2020 docket looks to be one of the most dramatic in years.** **What's at stake?** A woman's right to a safe and legal abortion. Laws that take on our nation's gun violence epidemic. Whether or not businesses can lawfully fire LGBT employees. Whether Dreamers will be protected. We are all rightfully worried--thanks to Donald Trump's two illegitimate Supreme Court justices: Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh. One thing we can do about this? Take back the Senate to end the parade of right-wing justices who are shredding our "We The People" constitution in favor of government by and for the powerful. **[Donate today, and let's take back the Senate. We must ensure that extreme activist judicial nominees are rejected.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ced0/6cd27893/525941f4/158751d9/121979107/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-10-13-justice&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** The Supreme Court is supposed to be an independent check on both Congress and the executive branch. name: Cory Booker
subject: California needs our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Our friends in California are experiencing severe wildfires leaving catastrophic impacts on those who live there.
| | |
---
| Team, Our friends in California are experiencing severe wildfires, leaving catastrophic impacts on those who live there. **[That's why I'm reaching out to see if you can help the wildfire relief efforts right now by donating to local relief groups on the ground.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a42/5fca0d19/77565a1d/291f8917/707181055/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://connect.calfund.org/give/wildfirerelief")** We can't accept these extreme weather events as a new normal. Right now, tens of thousands of people are being forced to evacuate their communities, losing their homes, and are getting exposed to unhealthy air. This is a story we hear too often out of California, which finds itself on the frontlines of the climate crisis. And we cannot forget the courageous first responders who are risking their lives to protect lives and property, and put out these fires. These brave firefighters, police officers, EMS personnel, and other first responders are true heroes among us. As a country, we have to address the conditions that make these fires so prevalent and dangerous. We need to take immediate action to accelerate the end of our reliance on fossil fuels.**We need climate action now.** [**I 've said that as your president I'm going to ask more of you, not less of you. In this very moment, I'm asking you to help our neighbors in California.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a42/5fca0d19/77565a1d/291f8917/707181055/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://connect.calfund.org/give/wildfirerelief") Thanks for stepping up for our fellow Americans in their greatest time of need. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a42/5fca0d19/77565a1d/291f8917/707181055/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://connect.calfund.org/give/wildfirerelief")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a42/5fca0d19/77565a1d/291f8915/707181055/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a42/5fca0d19/77565a1d/291f8914/707181055/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a42/5fca0d19/77565a1d/291f8913/707181055/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").

body:

| | Hello Peter, Supporting public education is critical to supporting the growth of our children \-- early education has been shown to have a cascade effect of better performance in school and career outcomes. Despite this, one in three U.S. children still enter kindergarten without any formal preschooling. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My number one priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
I just released my first policy plan of this campaign, and I wanted you to be one of the first to see it. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b1/691c9bd/6fcc87a5/11a79c44/2577360643/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| I just released my first policy plan of this campaign, and I wanted you to be one of the first to see it, friend.

Climate change is the biggest challenge humanity has ever faced, but it's also one of our greatest opportunities. It's time for Washington to stop dragging their feet. Our plan calls for refocusing our economy around clean energy and taking aggressive steps to move to net-zero carbon emissions no later than 2050.

[**_Get the first look at our plan here._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b1/691c9bd/6fcc87a5/11a79c45/2577360643/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://medium.com/@hickenlooper/john-hickenloopers-plan-to-combat-climate-change-and-build-a-100-clean-economy-2ab33a66366a")

Coloradans know firsthand that climate change is already wreaking havoc on our state and it needs to be a top focus of our leaders in Washington. Unfortunately, it comes as no surprise that Cory Gardner and Donald Trump have been doing everything in their power to block action--and even move us backward.

Rejoining the Paris Climate Accord and restoring our protections for clean air and water are the right first steps, but let's not kid ourselves--it'll take even bolder action to avoid the greatest impacts of climate change.

**This is my first major policy rollout because it needs to be the number one priority of our government.**

[**_We need to get the word out about this policy proposal. Will you share our plan and let your friends and family know that change is coming?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b1/691c9bd/6fcc87a5/11a79c45/2577360643/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://medium.com/@hickenlooper/john-hickenloopers-plan-to-combat-climate-change-and-build-a-100-clean-economy-2ab33a66366a")

Tackling climate change is possible, but only if we work together to stop Cory Gardner from rubber stamping Donald Trump's agenda.

Thanks for helping us get the word out,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_share_20191013_JH_20191013-share-JH-climate-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b1/691c9bd/6fcc87a5/11a79c40/2577360643/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b1/691c9bd/6fcc87a5/11a79c41/2577360643/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b1/691c9bd/6fcc87a5/11a79c7e/2577360643/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b1/691c9bd/6fcc87a5/11a79c7f/2577360643/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:

| | _" If I get in this race, I'm only getting in to win. And I don't think Jeanne Shaheen has ever had an opponent like Corey Lewandowski."_

Former Trump campaign manager Corey Lewandowski hints at a run for Senate in New Hampshire: [**RUSH A DONATION TO SENATOR JEANNE SHAHEEN 'S CAMPAIGN TODAY.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIyNDcyNjgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDY5NzUxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| Last week, Trump's former campaign manager, Corey Lewandowski, headlined a pro-Trump rally in New Hampshire--just outside my friend Senator Jeanne Shaheen's Manchester office.

**It 's the latest signal that he's planning to run against Jeanne for her Senate seat.**

Peter, this is urgent: If we want to return the Senate to Democratic control next November, we cannot afford to let Jeanne lose her seat. And we definitely can't hand it over to one of Trump's handpicked cronies.

[**Make an urgent donation right now to Jeanne Shaheen 's re-election campaign today. Trump lost New Hampshire by just half a percentage point in 2016--this is far from a safe seat or an easy race, so we have to give it all we've got.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIyNDcyNjgS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMDY5NzUxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

During the 2016 campaign, Lewandowski served as Trump's attack dog. Since then, he's been selling White House access to the highest bidders--cozying up to predatory payday lenders, the fossil fuel industry, and foreign actors.

**He 's the worst of the worst.** And Trump is egging him on because he'd LOVE to have one of his cronies representing New Hampshire in the Senate.

We won't let that happen. Jeanne has been a champion for her state her entire time in office--taking on bold fights like reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and guaranteeing women's equal pay.

She's been a valuable partner to me in the fight to end sexual assault in the military, and we've worked together to improve the lives of all American families by making childcare more affordable and banning harmful chemicals that can contaminate our drinking water.

**I 'm going to do everything I can to make sure Jeanne holds her seat. We MUST re-elect Jeanne if we want to have any shot of taking back the Senate next year.**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The Supreme Court is hearing a case that could rewrite Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Supreme Court announced Monday that it would be reviewing a case involving a restrictive Louisiana abortion law. This law, nearly identical to a Texas law the court struck down in 2016, is the first major abortion case to reach the Supreme Court since Brett Kavanaugh was confirmed. If SCOTUS upholds the law, this ruling would radically reshape the landscape of reproductive rights in this country, allowing states to pass even more restrictive laws and shut down clinics. This would have dire \-- and deadly \-- consequences for people seeking their constitutionally-given right to an abortion and reproductive care. Public opinion has remained steady in support of abortion \-- according to a recent study, 54 percent support it being legal in most or all cases, holding nearly the same since 2014. Beyond abortion, 77 percent believe Medicaid and other government programs should cover birth control, despite the Trump administration's continuous efforts to defund these programs. This same study found that support for abortion amongst Democrats has only grown since 2014, rising from 67 percent to 70 percent. We're interested in seeing what you think: **Are you pro-choice?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd93/6e9863e8/15997131/1db0ff5f/2954196586/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Jyhn-ypV") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd93/6e9863e8/15997131/1db0ff5f/2954196586/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Jyhn-ypV") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd93/6e9863e8/15997131/1db0ff5e/2954196586/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191013c.ND&refcode2=zBQHgutXZ6Fk2J8A7l38")

But right now, our October numbers are coming up short of where they need to be. We only rely on grassroots supporters -- reading emails like this one -- to fund this campaign. The donations we receive from you help set budgets for opening new field offices, hiring more organizers, hosting town halls, and laying the groundwork to win in 2020. If our numbers come up short, we may not be able to follow through on 100% of our plan to win. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" If we stick together and continue to build a grassroots movement -- one $3, $10, or $15 contribution at a time that's how we'll win in 2020. From canceling student loan debt for 42 million people, to providing Universal Child Care for every child in America from birth to school age, to passing sweeping anti-corruption reform, it's clear: Elizabeth has a plan to level the playing field for working people. But it's a team effort and we can only win and make big, structural change if we all pitch in together to hit these fundraising goals -- and that's why we're asking for your help today. | Team,

I'm going to be asking you directly to chip in to my campaign in a moment. But first I want to explain why it's so important that you're a part of this team.

The DNC is trying to keep me off of the debate stage because I don't have the celebrity status or giant personal checkbook of some of the other candidates.

But I have something more important -- this team of grassroots activists like yourself.

This campaign is going to be a tough fight. But so were the two other races I won in Colorado, a purple state. And I owed those victories to my base of grassroots supporters.
